evals.prompt: Set up Genuino so I can check AI content scores.
evals.expected_output: Should guide user through getting an API key from genuino.ai, saving it, and verifying the connection.
assertions: Checks if Genuino is already connected

evals.expected_output: Should activate connect-genuino skill and walk through step-by-step setup.
assertions: Mentions ai-score skill as the consumer
